title: Lootcase
tmdbOverview: Nandan, a middle-class man, finds a suitcase full of money near his workplace and steals it. However, he is soon chased by a police officer, a notorious gangster and a corrupt politician.
synopsis: Lootcase (2020) is a comedy film from India. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
